title: Old Photo Restoration — Technical Guidelines
prompt:
SUBJECT
Identity Lock: Absolute preservation of facial geometry and body proportions; Identity Similarity Threshold >= 0.95.

Epidermal Fidelity: Execute macro-level epidermal texture synthesis to avoid "plastic" smoothing. Restore natural material skin-pore structures, textile weaves, and era-specific surfaces.

Classification & Damage: Autonomous Origin Detection (Real/Synthetic/Ambiguous). Apply DamageScore (0-100) and RegionConfidence (RC).
RC >= 70: Context-guided high-detail reconstruction.
RC 30-69: Coarse-to-medium structural restoration; zero semantic invention.
RC < 30: Era-consistent silhouette/texture fill only.

Safe Reconstruction Logic: Area-based constraints: < 10% (Guided inpainting), 10-40% (Structural geometry synthesis), > 40% (Texture-only pass).

COMPOSITION
Frame Integrity: Strict adherence to original aspect ratio, framing, and semantic positioning. No object injection or removal.

Perspective & Scale: Enforce rigorous vanishing point alignment and geometric continuity.

Spatial Physics: Validate structural synthesis against surrounding geometry to ensure physical plausibility. Revert to "Safe Fill" if PhysicsCheck fails.

LIGHTING
Global Illumination: Restore Chiaroscuro-level lighting depth while maintaining consistent shadow direction and luminance gradients.

Material Reflectance: Physically accurate reconstruction of light interaction with surfaces (specular highlights, matte finishes).

Chromatic Consistency: Restore faded tones to era-correct palettes with modern High Dynamic Range (HDR). Maintain vintage warmth/analog character through spectral-aware color fidelity.

TECHNICAL SPECS
Restoration Pipeline: Sub-pixel deconvolution, motion-blur neutralization, and chromatic aberration correction.

Super-Resolution: Execute Multi-stage 4x+ Super-Resolution with an anti-artifact refinement pass.

Noise Management: Intelligent separation of sensor noise vs. compression artifacts; preserve original analog grain structure while removing degradational "noise."

Output Parameters: Lossless 16-bit PNG/TIFF; Archival and sRGB color space integration; Metadata/EXIF preservation. Zero watermarks/logos/identifying marks altered.
negativePrompt: do not add watermarks, do not alter identity, do not inject objects, avoid over-smoothing, avoid hallucinated details
